revision.comment: Fixed iteration-and-removal bug
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Labelled_list_hatnote]]
Don't Lua error when out of expensive parser function calls
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Labelled_list_hatnote]]
Adding [[Category:mass bump]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:wikipedia>Pppery|wikipedia>Pppery]]
Don't Lua error when out of expensive parser function calls
Don't Lua error when out of expensive parser function calls
1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates
Don't Lua error when out of expensive parser function calls
Don't Lua error when out of expensive parser function calls
Don't Lua error when out of expensive parser function calls
1 revision imported: I hope this manages to go through
Don't Lua error when out of expensive parser function calls
Don't Lua error when out of expensive parser function calls
1 revision imported
Don't Lua error when out of expensive parser function calls
1 revision imported: lets hope this fixes it since the qq=draft was showing up
Exclude section anchors from ifexists, properly show "no input" error message when ifexists=true
1 revision imported: importing the coordinates
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting
